---
title: "MONAI: Medical Open Network for AI"
author: 
  - name: Alan McMillan
    email: abmcmillan@wisc.edu
    
date: 2024-08-14
date-format: long
image: "../../../images/monai-logo.jpg"

categories: 
  - Libraries
  - Deep learning
  - PyTorch
  - Medical imaging
  - Model exploration
---

[MONAI](https://project-monai.github.io/) (Medical Open Network for AI) is an open-source, community-supported framework for deep learning in healthcare imaging. Built on top of PyTorch, it provides specialized functionality for medical imaging tasks, including pre-trained models, data loaders, and evaluation metrics tailored for the medical domain. MONAI is particularly valuable for researchers and practitioners looking to leverage deep learning for medical imaging applications due to its flexibility, performance, and ease of integration with existing workflows.

#### Prerequisites
- [Introduction to Deep Learning with PyTorch](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Learn/Workshops/Intro-Deeplearning_PyTorch.html)

## Related resources
- [**Model**: U-Net](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Toolbox/Models/UNET.html): A foundational segmentation architecture widely used in MONAI for medical imaging tasks.
- [**Playlists**: ML4MI Seminar](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Applications/Videos/ML4MI/index.html): Seminar series on machine learning for medical imaging.
- [**Workshop**: Intro to Deep Learning with PyTorch](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Learn/Workshops/Intro-Deeplearning_PyTorch.html): MONAI is built on PyTorch — start here if you're new to the framework.
- [MONAI Tutorials](https://github.com/Project-MONAI/tutorials)
- [MIDeL — Medical Image Deep Learning](https://mayo-radiology-informatics-lab.github.io/MIDeL/index.html)
- [MONAI Bootcamp 2021 (Video Series)](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLtoSVSQ2XzyCobzE6NvwjNpITsQyPUtfs)

## Comments
